code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
func getTargetForRedirect(target string, domain string) string {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Check if tha an t-sreath URL targaid a chaidh a thoirt seachad a-staigh an raon a chaidh a thoirt seachad.
Ma tha, tilg a-mach an URL targaid airson ath-thionndadh; mura h-eil, thig gu URL an raoin airson ath-thionndadh.
Cleachd protocal https.

Examples:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: An t-sreath URL targaid.
@param domain: An t-sreath raoin, gun protocal.

@return An t-sreath URL airson ath-thionndadh.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Check if the provided target URL is within the given domain range.
If it is, return the target URL for redirection; if not, return the domain URL for redirection.
Use the https protocol.

Examples:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirection.
prompt_2_segments:
Check if an t-url targaid a chaidh a thoirt seachad a tha ann an domhan a chaidh a thoirt seachad.
Ma tha, tilg an t-url targaid air ais airson ath-thionndadh; mura h-eil, thèid an domhan URL a chleachdadh airson ath-thionndadh.
Cleachd protocal https.

Examples:
	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: An t-url targaid.
@param domain: An domhan, gun protocal.

@return An t-url airson ath-thionndadh.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en:
Check if the provided target URL is in the given domain.
If it is, return the target URL for redirection; if not, the domain URL will be used for redirection.
Use the https protocol.

Examples:
	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL.
@param domain: The domain, without protocol.

@return The URL for redirection.
prompt_3_segments:
Check if tha an strìng URL targaid a chaidh a thoirt seachad taobh a-staigh an raon a chaidh a thoirt seachad.
Ma tha, thoir air ais an URL targaid airson ath-thionndadh; mura h-eil, thèid a' phàirt a dh'ionnsaigh an URL raoin airson ath-thionndadh.
Cleachd protocal https.

Examples:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: An strìng URL targaid.
@param domain: An strìng raoin, gun protocal.

@return An strìng URL airson ath-thionndadh.
prompt_3_bt_segments_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the given domain range.
If it is, return the target URL for redirection; if not, the part targeting the domain URL will be returned for redirection.
Use the https protocol.

Examples:
	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirection.

code: // {PROMPT_1}func storeInfoInHeader(infoType string, infoContent string, header map[string]string) map[string]string {
prompts_en:
storeInfoInHeader stores the provided information in an existing HTTP response header map under the specified type.
This function considers the following information types: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. They are stored as the keys 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', and 'Cache-Control', respectively.
Information content is read from user requests.
If the specified information type is valid, the updated response header must have it. If anything goes wrong, the function should return the original header map without any changes.

Args:

infoType (string): The type of information to store in the header.
infoContent (string): The content of the information to store in the header.
header (map[string]string): The existing response header map.

Returns:

map[string]string: The updated response header map with the stored information.
prompt_1:
// storeInfoInHeader a' stòradh an fhiosrachadh a chaidh a thoirt seachad ann an mapa freagairte HTTP a tha ann mar-thà fo na seòrsa sònraichte.
Tha an gnìomh seo a' beachdachadh air na seòrsaichean fiosrachaidh a leanas: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Tha iad air an stòradh mar na h-ìrean 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', agus 'Cache-Control', fa leth.
Tha an t-eòlas fiosrachaidh air a leughadh bho iarrtasan luchd-cleachdaidh.
Ma tha an seòrsa fiosrachaidh a chaidh a shònrachadh dligheach, feumaidh an freagairte freagairte ùraichte a bhith aige. Ma thèid rud sam bith ceàrr, bu chòir don ghnìomh a bhith a' toirt air ais an mapa freagairte tùsail gun atharrachaidhean sam bith.

Args:
	infoType (string): An seòrsa fiosrachaidh airson a stòradh anns an fhreagairte.
	infoContent (string): An t-eòlas fiosrachaidh airson a stòradh anns an fhreagairte.
	header (map[string]string): An mapa freagairte a tha ann mar-thà.

Returns:

/*
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>

	<student>
	    <username>john_doe</username>
	    <password>jdpassword</password>
	    <name>John Doe</name>
	    <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
	    <age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
	    <username>bob_smith</username>
	    <password>bspassword</password>
	    <name>Bob Smith</name>
	    <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
	    <age>22</age>
	</student>

</students>

Use these libs:
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree/xmltree"

We can construct a XPath query and then execute the query to search for the student information.

@param xmlData The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A tuple (name, age, citizenship) if the student is found. Otherwise, returns empty strings.
*/
func getStudentInfo(xmlData, username, password string) (string, string, string) {
